details: Strict Spanish localization quality and SEO recheck passed for all 40 Spanish pilot pages under /es/tools/{localized-slug}/.

Clear quality issues were found and fixed: Spanish breadcrumb wording, localized category badges, Spanish nav/footer labels, Spanish hub copy, Spanish form option labels, and accent/grammar polishing for generated Spanish copy.
Spanish visible copy now uses natural localized wording for H1, intro, FAQs, below-tool guides, safety notes, buttons, nav/footer labels, category badges, and pilot tool controls.
The selected Spanish keywords and slugs keep the same tool intent as the English tools; no misleading, brand-risky, or off-intent localized keyword targets were found.
All Spanish meta titles and descriptions are unique, useful, and not keyword-stuffed; duplicate Spanish titles: 0; duplicate Spanish descriptions: 0.
FAQ questions and answers are localized Spanish, practical, and specific enough for the pilot; below-tool guide sections provide real usage tips and review guidance rather than repeated filler.
No adult, hateful, violent, deceptive, fake identity, fake document, credential/security, harassment, or spam framing found in the 40 Spanish pilot pages.

No positive promises around rankings, traffic, sales, followers, approvals, legal results, financial results, accuracy, or platform performance found; safety wording is framed as review/caution where relevant.
Exactly 40 Spanish localized pages generated in dist/es/tools.
All 40 Spanish pilot pages render index/follow robots directives.
All 40 Spanish pages self-canonicalize to their Spanish URLs; all 40 English source pages keep English self-canonicals.
All 40 pilot pairs include correct en, es, and x-default hreflang alternates; x-default points to the English same-tool URL.
English pages switch to the Spanish same-tool route; Spanish pages switch back to the English same-tool route; missing localization fallback remains same-tool English.
Generated sitemap includes exactly 40 Spanish localized pilot URLs and no missing Spanish pilot URLs.
Duplicate Spanish localized slugs: 0.
Localized active noindex tools: 0; localized redirect-source tools: 0.
No hardcoded taptogen.vercel.app or localhost references found in scanned source, theme, public, scripts, or built Spanish tool pages.
Built HTML internal-link crawl found 0 broken internal links.
Active tools: 430; active English noindex tools: 51; active English indexable tools: 379; redirects: 20; final built pages: 499.
npx.cmd tsc --noEmit completed with exit code 0.
npx.cmd astro check completed with exit code 0, 0 errors, 0 warnings, and 2 existing hints for unused pass28 controls in src/data/tool-page-data.ts.
npm.cmd run build completed with exit code 0; Vite reported the existing large chunk warning; postbuild added 20 tool merge 301 redirects.
No commit was made.
